title: the inverted craft mod
description: This adds some stuff related to the color purple and more
body:
This adds some stuff related to the color purple (its my fav color) and adds some mobs like turkeys and pigeons. adds a biome called "purpidy" and more

edit: okay im forced to do this, 
this adds a biome called purpidy thats all purple and has purple trees and purple flowers.
it adds old wood which is wood made from sticks rather then logs and have a way lower blast resistance and also can be mined slightly faster
it adds pigeons and turkeys. Da_Inverted_Dead_Guy
it also makes it so you can craft totems.
and also it adds drawers and trash cans. kilns (work in progress. doesnt work yet)
and yeah, thats like basicly all it does


recomended to get the resource pack for my mod here (link will be added when i upload my resource pack to modrinth.



so yeah, its my mod (originaly called "ma' mod" but no longer is to make it make way more sence.
